core.execution.experiment_runner module

EXPERIMENT RUNNER – Shared logic for all experiment scripts

This module contains ONLY the code that is duplicated between test_harness.py and run_experiment.py. All original features remain in each script.

NEW FEATURES ADDED: - Session grouping (group_id) - Status tracking (running/completed/partial/failed) - Multi-provider support - Progress tracking (runs_completed/runs_total)

Author: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.execution.experiment_runner.ExperimentRunner(config_loader, args)[source]

Bases: object

Shared experiment logic - ONLY duplicate code + new features

aggregate_run_stats(run_id: int, cpu_samples: List[Dict], interrupt_samples: List[Dict]) → Dict[source]

Compute aggregated statistics for a run from samples. This will populate runs table with correct averages.

convert_energy_samples(results) → List[Dict][source]

Convert energy samples - identical in both scripts

create_experiment(db, task_id, task_name, provider, linear_config, country_code, repetitions, hw_id, env_id, optimizer=False) → int[source]

Create experiment with session tracking (NEW)

ensure_baseline(harness) → BaselineMeasurement | None[source]

Baseline measurement - add to run_experiment which currently lacks it

ensure_baseline_in_db(db, harness)[source]

Save baseline to database once per experiment session.

get_cpu_samples(results) → List[Dict][source]

Get CPU samples - identical in test_harness and run_experiment

get_environment_info() → Dict[str, Any][source]

Get environment information for reproducibility tracking

get_hardware_info() → Dict[str, Any][source]

Get hardware info - loads from hw_config.json and flattens it

get_interrupt_samples(results) → List[Dict][source]

Get interrupt samples - identical in test_harness and run_experiment

get_providers()[source]

Get list of providers from args (NEW)

prepare_run_data(results, baseline_id=None) → List[Dict][source]

Extract run data from ml_dataset - identical in both scripts

save_pair(db, exp_id, hw_id, linear_result, agentic_result, rep_num)[source]

Save one pair of runs with all samples.

setup_database() → Tuple[DatabaseManager, int, int][source]

Setup database connection and return db, hw_id, env_id

setup_environment(db) → int[source]

Get or create environment record

update_progress(db, exp_id: int, runs_completed: int)[source]

Update progress of an experiment without changing status.

Parameters:

  • db – Database connection

  • exp_id – Experiment ID

  • runs_completed – Number of runs completed so far

update_status(db, exp_id: int, status: str, runs_completed: int = None, error: str = None)[source]

Update experiment status (NEW)
